reviews.comment: Awesome service and experience. They have done three cars for me and one of my good friends and they never fail to impress. I will be talking car number four in this week to have another amazing job done. If you are looking for a personalized customer service experience, go with them hand down. On top of that, the work is top notch.

reviews.comment: Favorite shop in Frederick. I’ve had 2 cars done by them and plan on getting more done. Family owned shop that emulates respect, quick responses, and an excellent finished product. Couldn’t be happier with the tint job completed today.

reviews.comment: 1st off this is a veteran owned and operated company.  Recently my husband had a windshield replaced and needed the tint back and he found Frederick Window Tint by referral. He went in and gave them his vision as they do have the equipment to cut to size for almost every car or truck. But he had a different vision than the norm and they hit it out of the park. 100% this is the place for professional work, quick responses and service and overall good people. We will be back and thanks again
